subcodes.first_line: O thou who art rejoicing in the glad-tidings of God! Blessed art thou for having quaffed from the chalice of God's love and drunk of the celestial wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها المستبشر ببشارات الله هنیئا لک بما تجرعت من کاس محبه الله و شربت صهباء
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @the power of words; of speech, @light and darkness
